adoptedPolicy: Policy A: A10c stat cards use embedded icons; code-side stat icon overlays are disabled for normal tagless stat cards.
changes: Stopped separate icon overlay for normal stat upgrade cards to prevent double icons and position drift.
Shifted stat card text right so it does not collide with embedded card icons.
Added STATUS / ???? label for stat upgrade cards to distinguish them from adaptation cards.
Passed branch heroPath/portraitPath into evolution candidate UI.
Evolution candidate UI now prefers portraitPath before heroPath.
BRANCH HUD keeps portrait rendering and fallback only for missing texture cases.

portraitChecks.evolutionCandidateCards: candidate portraitPath is now passed from branch data and preferred by the card image loader
portraitChecks.branchHud: HUD getPortraitTexture covers velociraptor/triceratops/tyrannosaurus/spinosaurus and ZERO branch portraits

qa.nodeCheck: passed: levelup_ui.js, evolution_ready_ui.js, hud.js, play_scene.js, asset_manifest.js
